description: Finish the additional baseline expansion for the offline diagnosis example, including RBPModel and GDDPFisherModel registry wiring, BOQAModel runtime-safe enablement with 2022 HPO fallback, and quiet BOQA subprocess execution.

userStories.title: Add RBPModel to the candidate registry
userStories.description: As a user of the offline diagnosis example, I want RBPModel included in the dynamic ensemble so that the script can use the next locally constructible baseline.
acceptanceCriteria: Update `timgroup_disease_diagnosis/codes/core/core/script/example_predict_ensemble.py` so `MODEL_CANDIDATES` includes `RBPModel` after `MinICModel`
Add a builder for `RBPModel(hpo_reader=hpo_reader_with_all_hpo, model_name='RBPModel')` in `build_available_models()`
Add focused tests in `timgroup_disease_diagnosis/codes/core/tests/test_example_predict_ensemble.py` asserting candidate presence and inclusion when availability is forced
Run targeted pytest for the RBPModel stories and keep it green
Tests pass
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Implemented in main workspace. Added RBPModel candidate, builder, and focused tests.

userStories.title: Add GDDPFisherModel to the candidate registry
userStories.description: As a user of the offline diagnosis example, I want GDDPFisherModel included in the dynamic ensemble so that the expanded offline ensemble uses the next practical similarity baseline.
acceptanceCriteria: Update `timgroup_disease_diagnosis/codes/core/core/script/example_predict_ensemble.py` so `MODEL_CANDIDATES` includes `GDDPFisherModel` after `RBPModel`
Add a builder for `GDDPFisherModel(hpo_reader=hpo_reader_with_all_hpo, model_name='GDDPFisherModel')` in `build_available_models()`
Extend `timgroup_disease_diagnosis/codes/core/tests/test_example_predict_ensemble.py` so the default available-model and wiring assertions include `GDDPFisherModel`
Run targeted pytest for the GDDPFisherModel stories and keep it green
Tests pass
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Implemented in main workspace. Added GDDPFisherModel candidate, builder, and regression coverage.

userStories.title: Add runtime-safe BOQAModel candidate gating
userStories.description: As a maintainer, I want BOQAModel registered only when its external assets are present so that script startup does not crash on repositories missing the legacy BOQA inputs.
acceptanceCriteria: Update `timgroup_disease_diagnosis/codes/core/core/script/example_predict_ensemble.py` so `BOQAModel` is represented as an optional candidate with an explicit availability check instead of an unconditional baseline
The BOQAModel availability check accepts legacy `2019` HPO raw files or the repository's `2022` fallback HPO raw files, plus the BOQA jar and `java`

Add tests in `timgroup_disease_diagnosis/codes/core/tests/test_example_predict_ensemble.py` covering candidate presence, false availability when legacy assets are missing, and inclusion when availability is forced
Run targeted pytest for the BOQAModel stories and keep it green
Tests pass
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Implemented in main workspace. BOQAModel is runtime-gated, falls back to the repository's 2022 HPO assets when 2019 files are absent, and no longer blocks startup.

userStories.title: Verify the expanded ensemble end to end and record completion notes
userStories.description: As a maintainer, I want the expanded ensemble verified with regression tests and real script runs so that the remaining plan can be closed with concrete evidence.
acceptanceCriteria: Run `PYTHONPATH=timgroup_disease_diagnosis/codes/core .venv/bin/python -m pytest timgroup_disease_diagnosis/codes/core/tests/test_example_predict_ensemble.py timgroup_disease_diagnosis/codes/core/tests/test_cycommon_fallback.py timgroup_disease_diagnosis/codes/core/tests/test_python312_compat.py timgroup_disease_diagnosis/codes/core/tests/test_boqa_model.py timgroup_disease_diagnosis/codes/core/tests/test_hpo_reader_paths.py -q` successfully
Run the default `example_predict_ensemble.py` script successfully and verify the quiet `Available models:` line includes `RBPModel`, `GDDPFisherModel`, and `BOQAModel` in the current repo snapshot
Run the CLI override `example_predict_ensemble.py --topk 3 --hpo-list HP:0001913,HP:0008513,HP:0001123` successfully and verify it prints a 3-row aligned table without raw tuple output
Add completion notes reflecting that BOQAModel now uses the 2022 HPO fallback and the quiet subprocess path
Tests pass
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Verified with 40 passing focused tests plus successful default and CLI script runs. Completion notes were refreshed to reflect BOQAModel fallback and quiet subprocess execution.
